title: On Ancient Ground-Core
description: Mod written for the On Ancient Ground modpack to add essential content.
body:
# On Ancient Ground - Core

This mod adds custom and integration content for the On Ancient Ground modpack. Which is a 1.21 modpack based around TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) and Pastel.

This mod is open source with the hope that its code can help others make mods, especially for addons or modpacks centered around TerraFirmaCraft.

## Important Note

Keep in mind that no datapack or resource pack assets are in the mod as of now, all of these assets are in the modpack the mod is written for. Many of these will be moved to this mod as Kubejs datagen is being dropped in favor for Java.

Keep in mind that as the associated modpack is released and playtested bugs may come up. Please report these on Github or Discord (see bar to the side, or top on mobile for links).

## Content

It currently contains:
- A Snow Shovel Tool.
- Glass and Glass Pane Molds.
- Wrought Iron Bucket.
- New Ores: Bauxite, Galena, Anthracite. 
- Clay Type Registry adding 4 clay types and associated items.

And it adds TFC-like:
- Fruit Trees (Fig, Wolfberry, for Caupona integration)
- Crops (Coffee, Cotton, for Rustic Delight integration)
- Stationary Bushes (Aloe, Sawblade Berry, for Pastel integration)
- Wood Type Blocks  (Sewing Tables, Looms, Shelves, etc, for Pastel integration)
- Metal Types for Create: Big Cannons and Create: Stuff & Additions integrations.
- Rock Types for Create, Vanilla and Pastel integrations. 

# Link To Pack
Pack soon to release.
